channel.title: Microsoft on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft on Remko's Blog

item.title: Application causes Screen Flickering in Citrix XenApp Session
item.description:
Yesterday I was asked to troubleshoot an interesting issue with an application running on Citrix XenApp.

Environment
This customer is running Citrix XenApp 5 on Windows Server 2003 (x86). On the Client Side the Online Plugin version 12.3 is used.

The Problem
When this particular application was active the screen was flickering and black blocks appeared at seemingly random places. Further more it was not possible to resize the window:

My experience is that display issues are often related to either HDX Flash Redirection (offloading flash to the client) or the Multi Monitor hook.

item.title: Resuming Microsoft's (Akami) Download Manager
item.description: If you ever download software from Microsoft's Volume Licensing Site you have probably seen that it uses the Akamai download manager. Sometimes your downloads get interrupted but how to restart the downloadmanager? There's no entry in the startmenu and not even an icon on the desktop.
